message:
test(snapshots): update golden snapshots for demo screens

Updates all snapshot files to reflect recent changes:
- Dashboard layout improvements with new metrics widgets
- Code explorer syntax highlighting changes
- File browser preview pane additions
- i18n demo RTL rendering updates
- Macro recorder UI polish
- Markdown renderer theme updates
- Shakespeare reader progress indicator
- Terminal capabilities feature matrix
- Visual effects particle system rendering
- Widget gallery property editor additions
- New screen snapshots: accessibility panel, command palette lab,
  inline mode story, layout inspector, widget builder

All snapshots verified against expected rendering output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
